description_long: This ornate bench features a decorative white metal frame with intricate, geometric patterns forming the backrest and armrests. The seat consists of several parallel wooden slats, providing a natural contrast to the white metalwork. The legs are robust and stylized, echoing the decorative motifs of the backrest and arm supports. The bench is designed to comfortably seat two to three people and is likely intended for placement in parks, gardens, or elegant urban settings. The overall construction suggests durability and a blend of classic and modern aesthetics. The openwork design of the frame allows for airflow and visual lightness despite its sturdy build.
description: An ornate white metal bench with intricate geometric patterns and wooden slat seating, designed for elegant outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full decorative backrest, armrests, and the wooden slat seat.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the profile of the armrest, and the stylized leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detailed geometric pattern of the backrest and the supporting frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with clear visibility of the armrest and leg design.
attribute_leg_design: ornate metal legs with decorative motifs
